rulings.Case Title: JERRY WAYNE KING VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Defendant Honeywell International, Inc.'S Person(S) Most Qualified And Custodian(S) Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 24, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the further deposition of defendant Honeywell International, Inc.¿s person(s) most qualified and custodian(s) of records and request for production of documents: hearing required. The hearing will be January 24, 2013 at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
